How to publish a new version of the sqlanywhere node.js driver on npmjs.com. I 
do this on Windows but if you fix up mkpackage.pl, you may be able to do it on 
Unix as well.

1. p4 edit package.json
2. npm version patch
   This updates the patch number in package.json, i.e. 1.0.4 -> 1.0.5. You can
   also use "npm version minor" or "npm version major" to change other version
   numbers.
3. mkpackage.pl
   This creates a sqlanywhere-<version>.tgz file.
4. npm publish
   You may also need to do "npm adduser" and specify the sqlanywhere user and
   password if you haven't done that already.
